caption: In a lecture hall or seminar room with wood-paneled walls, a group of people is gathered for a presentation. A man stands at the front of the room, wearing a white shirt, black vest, and glasses, addressing a seated audience. To his left, another man in a blue shirt sits at a table with a red logo featuring a white crest. The audience consists of several people viewed from behind, including individuals wearing a maroon hoodie, a blue striped shirt, a yellow sweater, and a green jacket. Each frame features the white text "ORCA" in the lower right corner. As the sequence progresses, the presenter shifts his position slightly and gestures with his hand while speaking. The audience remains seated and attentive, facing the front of the room throughout the scene.
